notableEvents.label: Alejandro Osuna plunked
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna hit by pitch. Jake Burger to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Elmer Rodríguez. Josh Jung scores. Jake Burger to 3rd. Alejandro Osuna to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jake Burger GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Burger grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Jake Burger out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Higashioka pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Higashioka singles on a line drive to right fielder Aaron Judge. Josh Jung to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Sam Haggerty pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Haggerty flies out to left fielder Cody Bellinger.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Higashioka pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Higashioka called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue grounds out, third baseman Ryan McMahon to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.
